app.name: SJMCL
app.one_liner: A cross-platform Minecraft launcher with advanced instance management, modpack installation from CurseForge/Modrinth, multi-account support, and plugin extensibility.

screens.name: Account Manager
screens.purpose: Manage multiple Minecraft accounts using Microsoft login or third-party Yggdrasil-compatible authentication.

screens.name: Application Settings
screens.purpose: Configure global launcher behavior including download paths, JVM arguments, language, and plugin settings.

screens.name: Instance Dashboard
screens.purpose: Display and manage all Minecraft instances with quick access to launch, edit settings, and view associated resources.

screens.name: Mod & Resource Manager
screens.purpose: Browse, install, update, and remove mods, resource packs, shaders, and modpacks from integrated sources.

rust_commands.name: authenticate_account
rust_commands.purpose: Performs OAuth-based authentication for Microsoft or Yggdrasil-compatible accounts.

rust_commands.name: copy_game_logs
rust_commands.purpose: Retrieves and copies full game log output without data loss during large selections.

rust_commands.name: download_modpack
rust_commands.purpose: Downloads and unpacks a modpack from CurseForge or Modrinth into a new or existing instance.

rust_commands.name: install_mod_loader
rust_commands.purpose: Installs a specified mod loader (e.g., Forge, Fabric) into a given Minecraft instance.

mvp_plan: week 1: Define Rust command interface for instance operations
week 1: Implement core Tauri + Next.js shell with basic window management
week 1: Set up instance listing screen with mock data
week 2: Add mod loader installation workflow
week 2: Implement basic Microsoft account login flow
week 2: Integrate real instance CRUD logic with filesystem
week 3: Add log viewer with copy-safe buffer handling
week 3: Connect to CurseForge API for modpack discovery
week 4: Stabilize mod loader installer state machine
week 4: Write end-to-end acceptance tests for core flows
acceptance_tests: Copying 10,000+ lines from game log preserves all content without row loss
Nightly build warning appears only for non-stable releases in UI
Optifine installation completes reliably through defined state transitions
User can successfully install the FarmingTales modpack without mod loader failure
